options.systemMessage:
You are the editor of The Plannen Post, a personalised one-page newspaper rendered into a FIXED newsprint theme. Output a STRUCTURED plan the renderer fills into that theme — you write each body as inline HTML; the renderer supplies all CSS. Never restyle. OUTPUT SHAPE: - dateline: '{Weekday} · {DD} {Mon} · morning edition · {emoji} {high}°C' for today in Europe/Brussels. ALWAYS include the emoji and today's high — derive from the digested weather (today.sky → emoji: clear ☀, partly cloudy ⛅, overcast ☁, rain/showers 🌧, thunderstorm ⛈, snow ❄, fog 🌫; today.high → °C). - sections: an ORDERED array; each { id, column, kicker, tagline, byline?, body_html }. - column places the section on its page: 'left' = the day (ids events, intro, weather, in that order); 'center' = the feeds (ids sport, news, tech, startup, watches — include ONLY if you have real data, else omit); 'right' = personal (id inbox); 'tomorrow' = the sign-off (id outro). - kicker: short mono label. tagline: handwritten headline (short phrase). byline: intro only. body_html: inner HTML using ONLY

,

,

  • ,

    , , ; entities or unicode; times in Europe/Brussels. SECTION CONTENT: - events (left):
      of today's items '
    • HH:MM — Title · detail
      • ' earliest first; end with one

      of routines/practices + overdue todos. Fold an actionable cross-ref inline as '· ⚠ note' (one per item) — for any wind/gust warning use the CONSENSUS gust (today.gust.kmh) at the EVENT's hour, never the day's peak or a lone outlier. - intro (left): the lead — 1–2 short

      on the single most notable thing, plus byline. - weather (left): ALWAYS include. Use the DIGESTED weather (today.high/low, today.rain %, today.uv, today.sky). Mention wind ONLY if the consensus gust is notable (today.gust.kmh >= 35); use today.gust.kmh with its today.gust.hour, and if the spread is wide (today.gust.hi minus today.gust.lo > 25) phrase it as 'peak gusts ~X km/h around HH:00 (models Y–Z)' — never headline an outlier. April–September add a pollen line naming any type at moderate+ level (grass/birch/alder/mugwort/ragweed) — the user is allergic. Note UV if high.

      with . - feeds (center): from the Web Search tool. sport = a card

      (FIFA World Cup 2026 priority: Belgium last result / next fixture / group, then notable results & knockout picture). news =

        of top vrt.be Belgium + Mechelen-local items today. tech = a card

        of Databricks' latest CONFIRMED, already-announced releases (no speculation, no 'watch for X'). startup =

          of new EU-AI VC rounds THIS week (company + amount + investor). Fill each ONLY from substantive, recent, specific results; OMIT any feed that returns nothing concrete. No marketing. - inbox (right): main items
            (real people, deadlines, money — skip bulk); then optional

            Still open

            +
              . Use SENT mail to detect 'No response yet from X' (your message is the latest and they haven't replied) — gate to clearly-expected replies; a submission against a standing facility (a budget you draw down, a reimbursement/claims portal, a recurring filing) is NOT an open loop. - watches (center): call get_watch_queue; emit ONLY if something changed (new date, registration open/close, moved); else omit. - outro (tomorrow): a 'Tomorrow' sign-off — tomorrow's key events (call list_events for tomorrow), tomorrow's weather (tomorrow.high/low/sky, gust if notable), bins, and a 'Still needing you' line;

              +

                . SOURCES: plannen tools (get_briefing_context, get_daily_briefing, list_events today AND tomorrow, list_obligations, get_watch_queue) and the Web Search tool (Perplexity Sonar, real-time) for the feeds — call it with one focused query per feed. READ-ONLY — never create/update/delete. Inbox, sent, digested weather+pollen, prior memory are in the prompt. JUDGMENT: - ≤120 words/section, present tense, factual, no marketing, no emoji unless the data carries one. - De-dup by ownership: scheduled → events; email → inbox; forecast → weather; a web item → its feed. Non-owner only points. Lead may reference any fact only to add an angle. - Cross-refs inline only when actionable (weather hazard during an OUTDOOR event, colliding times, an email about today's event). Indoor hazard → silent. One per event. - Inbox three-state by the LAST message's author AND content: awaiting_user / awaiting_counterparty ('No response yet from X', but a standing facility is NOT an open loop) / resolved ('thanks/received/all set' either side → drop). Reconcile loops by ENTITY not thread (match on ref, else sender+topic; sender alone never). - Continuity gated: surface change-since-last-edition only when it adds signal (escalation, persistence, recurrence); else silent. - Never invent. Omit any section with no data. Also emit sidecar { open_items[{sender,ref,topic,state,shown_count}], inbox_surfaced[], events_today[] } and edition_date (yyyy-mm-dd, Brussels). Return ONLY the structured object.

parameters.jsCode:
const inp=$input.first().json;let out=(inp&&inp.output!==undefined)?inp.output:inp;if(typeof out==='string'){const s=out;let end=s.lastIndexOf('}');let parsed=null;while(end>=0&&!parsed){let depth=0,start=-1;for(let i=end;i>=0;i--){const c=s[i];if(c==='}')depth++;else if(c==='{'){depth--;if(depth===0){start=i;break;}}}if(start<0)break;try{const o=JSON.parse(s.slice(start,end+1));if(o&&(o.sections||o.dateline))parsed=o;}catch(e){}end=s.lastIndexOf('}',start-1);}out=parsed||{};}const sections=Array.isArray(out.sections)?out.sections:[];const dateline=out.dateline||'';const printed=$now.setZone('Europe/Brussels').toFormat('h:mm a').toLowerCase();const editionDate=out.edition_date||$now.setZone('Europe/Brussels').toFormat('yyyy-LL-dd');const art=(s)=>{const k=s.kicker?'
'+s.kicker+'
':'';const h=s.tagline?'

'+s.tagline+'

':'';const b=s.byline?'

'+s.byline+'

':'';const d=(s.id==='outro'||s.id==='weather')?'':'
';return '
'+k+h+b+d+'
'+(s.body_html||'')+'
';};const colNames=['left','center','right','tomorrow'];const colHtml={};colNames.forEach((n)=>{colHtml[n]=sections.filter((s)=>(s.column||'center')===n).map(art).join('');});const css=":root{--paper:#f1ebd9;--ink:#1a1a1a;--faint:#7a7368;--rule:#b6ab9a;--weather:#d6e7f7;--sticky:#fef4a8;--chip-pink:#f4c4c4;--chip-blue:#c0d8f4;--chip-green:#c8e6c8;}*{box-sizing:border-box;}html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}body{background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);font-family:'Lora',Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;padding:32px 48px 24px;}.masthead{text-align:center;margin-top:4px;}.masthead h1{font-family:'Roboto Slab','Georgia',serif;font-weight:900;font-style:normal;font-size:72px;line-height:1.0;letter-spacing:-0.01em;margin:0;}.masthead .dateline{margin-top:6px;font-style:italic;font-size:14px;color:#2a2a2a;}hr.rule-thin{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--ink);margin:10px 0 24px;}.columns{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1.25fr 1fr 1fr;gap:36px;}@media (max-width:900px){.columns{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px;}body{padding:24px 22px;font-size:18px;line-height:1.55;}.masthead h1{font-size:40px;}.post-section .body,.post-section--weather .body,.post-section--outro .body{font-size:17px;}.post-section .body .faint{font-size:15px;}.post-section--intro h2.hand{font-size:40px;}.post-section .kicker{font-size:11px;}}.col{min-width:0;}.post-section{margin-bottom:28px;}.post-section .kicker{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--faint);font-style:normal;margin-bottom:4px;}.post-section h2.hand,.post-section h3.hand{font-family:'Caveat','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-weight:500;font-style:normal;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.15;margin:0;}.post-section h2.hand{font-size:26px;}.post-section h3.hand{font-size:22px;}.post-section hr.dashed{border:none;border-top:1.5px dashed var(--rule);margin:8px 0 10px;}.post-section .body p{margin:0 0 10px;}.post-section .body p:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}.post-section .body ul{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0 0 10px;}.post-section .body ul li{padding-left:18px;position:relative;margin-bottom:6px;}.post-section .body ul li::before{content:'→';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;font-style:normal;color:var(--ink);}.post-section .body .faint{color:var(--faint);font-size:13px;}.post-section--intro .kicker::before{content:'↳ ';}.post-section--intro h2.hand{font-size:44px;line-height:1.0;margin-bottom:6px;}.post-section--intro .byline{font-size:13px;color:var(--faint);font-style:italic;margin:4px 0 14px;}.post-section--weather{background:var(--weather);border-radius:4px;padding:12px 14px;}.post-section--weather hr.dashed{display:none;}.post-section--weather h2.hand{font-size:24px;margin-top:2px;}.post-section--weather .body{font-size:14px;margin-top:6px;}.post-section--email h2.hand,.post-section--inbox h2.hand{font-size:22px;}.post-section--events h2.hand{font-size:22px;}.post-section--outro{background:var(--sticky);padding:14px 16px 16px;transform:rotate(-1.2deg);box-shadow:1px 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);margin-top:12px;}.post-section--outro .kicker{color:#6a5a00;}.post-section--outro h2.hand{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:4px;}.post-section--outro hr.dashed{display:none;}.post-section--outro .body{font-size:14px;}.post-section .body blockquote.pull{margin:0 0 10px;padding-left:12px;border-left:3px solid var(--rule);font-style:italic;color:#2a2a2a;}.footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:32px;font-style:italic;font-size:12px;color:var(--faint);}";const head='The Plannen Post';const masthead='

THE PLANNEN POST

'+dateline+'
';const foot='
printed fresh at '+printed+'
';const html=head+'
'+masthead+'
'+colHtml.left+'
'+colHtml.center+'
'+colHtml.right+'
'+colHtml.tomorrow+'
'+foot+'
';const nonEmpty=colNames.filter((n)=>colHtml[n]&&colHtml[n].trim().length>0);const pages=nonEmpty.map((n,i)=>{const top=(i===0?masthead:'');const bot=(i===nonEmpty.length-1?foot:'');return {name:'page'+(i+1),html:head+'
'+top+'
'+colHtml[n]+'
'+bot+'
'};});const subject='The Plannen Post — '+(dateline?dateline.split(' · ').slice(0,2).join(' '):editionDate);return [{json:{html:html,pages:pages,subject:subject,edition_date:editionDate,sidecar_json:JSON.stringify(out.sidecar||{})}}];

const w=$('Fetch Weather').item.json;const p=$('Fetch Pollen').item.json;const daily=(w&&w.daily)||{};const hourly=(w&&w.hourly)||{};const med=(arr)=>{const a=arr.filter(v=>v!=null&&!isNaN(v)).map(Number).sort((x,y)=>x-y);if(!a.length)return null;const m=Math.floor(a.length/2);return a.length%2?a[m]:(a[m-1]+a[m])/2;};const r1=(v)=>v==null?null:Math.round(v*10)/10;const dvals=(base,i)=>{const o=[];for(const k in daily){if(k===base||k.indexOf(base+'_')===0){const arr=daily[k];if(Array.isArray(arr)&&arr[i]!=null)o.push(Number(arr[i]));}}return o;};const sky=(c)=>{if(c==null)return 'unknown';c=Math.round(c);if(c===0)return 'clear';if(c<=2)return 'partly cloudy';if(c===3)return 'overcast';if(c>=45&&c<=48)return 'fog';if(c>=51&&c<=67)return 'rain';if(c>=71&&c<=77)return 'snow';if(c>=80&&c<=82)return 'showers';if(c>=95)return 'thunderstorm';return 'mixed';};const t=hourly.time||[];const dates=[];for(let i=0;i<t.length;i++){const dd=t[i].slice(0,10);if(dates.indexOf(dd)<0)dates.push(dd);}const gustOf=(dayDate)=>{const peaks=[];for(const k in hourly){if(k==='wind_gusts_10m'||k.indexOf('wind_gusts_10m_')===0){const arr=hourly[k];let mxx=null;for(let i=0;i<t.length;i++){if(t[i].slice(0,10)===dayDate&&Array.isArray(arr)&&arr[i]!=null){const v=Number(arr[i]);if(mxx==null||v>mxx)mxx=v;}}if(mxx!=null)peaks.push(mxx);}}if(!peaks.length)return null;return {kmh:Math.round(med(peaks)),lo:Math.round(Math.min.apply(null,peaks)),hi:Math.round(Math.max.apply(null,peaks)),models:peaks.length};};const day=(i)=>({high:r1(med(dvals('temperature_2m_max',i))),low:r1(med(dvals('temperature_2m_min',i))),rain:r1(med(dvals('precipitation_probability_max',i))),uv:r1(med(dvals('uv_index_max',i))),sky:sky(med(dvals('weather_code',i))),gust:gustOf(dates[i]||'')});const ph=(p&&p.hourly)||{};const mx=(a)=>Array.isArray(a)?Math.round(a.reduce((m,v)=>(v>m?v:m),0)):null;const pollen={grass:mx(ph.grass_pollen),birch:mx(ph.birch_pollen),alder:mx(ph.alder_pollen),mugwort:mx(ph.mugwort_pollen),ragweed:mx(ph.ragweed_pollen)};return [{json:{location:'Mechelen',consensus:'median of per-model daily-peak gust',today:day(0),tomorrow:day(1),pollen:pollen}}];

parameters.toolDescription: Search the live web via Tavily. Provide one focused query string. Returns ranked results (title, url, content). Use for the sport, news, tech and startup feeds.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'A focused, self-contained web-search question for one feed') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ html: $json.html, viewport_width: 620, viewport_height: 900, device_scale: 2, ms_delay: 600 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const ins=$input.all();const bin={};const props=[];for(let i=0;i<ins.length;i++){const it=ins[i];if(it.binary&&it.binary.data){const key='p'+(i+1);const meta=Object.assign({},it.binary.data);meta.fileName='post-'+(i+1)+'.png';meta.fileExtension='png';meta.mimeType='image/png';bin[key]=meta;props.push(key);}}const a=$('Assemble Edition').first().json;return [{json:{subject:a.subject,html:a.html,props:props.join(',')},binary:bin}];
